capabilities.name: Sequential approval chains (manager→director→CFO)
capabilities.notes: Stage-3 verified 2026-06-11 via agent-execute: step1(role)→step2(group), fin2→approved, reject stops; UI = ApprovalChainsPage + ApprovalInboxPage. Consumer routing (04.6) tracked under purchasing.multistep_approval.

capabilities.name: Approval groups (any-of N approvers)
capabilities.verify: approval_groups + members; step with group_id + min_approvals; distinct-approver counting verified (1/2→2/2)
capabilities.notes: Stage-3 verified 2026-06-11: any-N-of-group enforced (fin1→1/2, duplicate counts once, fin2→approved); UI = ApprovalChainsPage group editor.

capabilities.name: Delegation when approver unavailable
capabilities.verify: approval_delegations + manage_approval_delegation skill; advance_approval_step honors active delegations for role- and group-steps (migration 20260611210000)
capabilities.notes: Stage-3 verified 2026-06-11: delegate without role approved via delegation → request approved; revoke works; skill green via agent-execute.

capabilities.name: Auto-escalate/expire after N days
capabilities.notes: Stage-3 verified 2026-06-11: overdue step escalated 10→20 with audit log; final-step breach logged, never auto-approved. Escalate-to-next only (by design).

capabilities.name: Bulk approve/reject
capabilities.notes: Skill verified via runtime; bulk-select UI in ApprovalInboxPage. UI shipped 2026-06-12 (inbox checkboxes + sticky bulk bar, processed/failed surfaced). Dual-surface complete.

capabilities.name: Approver notification on assignment
capabilities.verify: notify_approval_assigned trigger emits approval.assigned platform event (agent_events) on create + step advance
capabilities.notes: Event verified in agent_events; automation/email listener wiring pending before done.
